title: New Horizon
body:
![Front Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b723133681e4bfdcf69af48a5bf19b1b01096b68_0.webp)
**a Modpack that aims for performance and quality of life mods**

Join the [**Discord**](https://discord.gg/T7zqzJZJjX) to support me! Oh yeah if you have any suggestions too.

#  Feautures
- Optimazation
- More structures
- Voice Chat
- Custom Footsteps
- Traveler's Backpack
- Ambient Sounds
- Custom Built mod⛏️

##  Questions You Might Have


_Will you be adding more mods to this modpack?_
- **Yes,I plan to add more mods to this Modpack**

_Can this be used in a Multiplayer Server?_
- **Yes, This Modpack is Originally for a SMP Server**

_Is there a dedicated server pack available for download?_
- **No, But i do have plans on creating one**

_if a server pack isnt available,are there instructions on how to set up a server for this?_
- **You can easily copy over the 'mods' files and put them on your server and it'll work fine**

_Do you need to edit the server configs?_
- **Optionally No, But it is reccomended for Voice Chat since 'Simple Voice Chat' is presence in this modpack but only if you want to use Voice Chat**

_Will You release a version thats higher than 1.21.1?_
- **Maybe, but i don't have plans on releasing a version thats higher 1.21.1 yet**
